summary: Frontend-only testing for NETTAS one-page-scroll section at /nettas. All 42 functional/UI checks passed including hero, live countdown ticker, sub-navbar (6 items) with active-state on scroll, floating back button visibility toggle, smooth-scroll subnav clicks, 5-item timeline, lomba essay card with tema/subtema/syarat/CTA, 3 speaker cards, hadiah section (Rp 5.000.000+, 4 podium cards), 2 marquee tracks (20 items total = 5 sponsor + 5 partner duplicated), daftar dual cards, footer with 2026 + Kembali button, stat counters animating to 500+/10+, mobile responsive layout, and main navbar Events>NETTAS link routing to /nettas.
critical_code_review_comments: All NETTAS CTA anchors (Daftar Events, Daftar Lomba Essay, lomba CTA, daftar-events/lomba CTAs) currently use href="#" placeholders. When real registration URLs (Google Form / Eventbrite / etc.) are ready, replace these with actual links, otherwise users will scroll to top of page on click.
Social icons in NETTAS footer for TikTok and YouTube use href="#" — replace with real social URLs when available.
Speaker cards intentionally show 'TBA' placeholders — confirmed expected by spec but flag for future content swap.
Console shows 401 errors from /api/auth/me (expected for unauthenticated visitors visiting public pages); not blocking but consider silencing on public routes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NETTAS page at /nettas is fully functional. All data-testid selectors are in place: nettas-page, nettas-hero, nettas-hero-title, nettas-countdown, nettas-cta-events, nettas-cta-lomba, nettas-subnav, nettas-subnav-{hero|timeline|lomba|speakers|hadiah|daftar}, nettas-float-back, nettas-timeline-item-{0..4}, nettas-lomba, nettas-lomba-cta, nettas-speaker-{0..2}, nettas-total-prize, nettas-daftar-events, nettas-daftar-lomba, nettas-footer, nettas-footer-home, nettas-stat-{peserta|institusi|sponsor & partner}. Note: stat testid for 'Sponsor & Partner' has spaces because label.toLowerCase() is used directly. Backend untouched; only test frontend going forward.
